task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST application window is open, and '4StoreyBuilding' is visible in the title bar or project tree.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the space properties or spreadsheet view for Equipment loads.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST Detailed Data Edit mode or a spreadsheet view is open, displaying Space properties, specifically the 'Equip W/sqft' or 'EQUIPMENT-W/SQFT' column.

task_completion.description: Update the Equipment Power Density to 0.65 W/ft² for all Middle Floor occupied spaces.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '0.65' is entered in the Equipment Power Density (W/sqft) field for the Middle Floor spaces (M.S21, M.E22, M.N23, M.W24, M.C25).

task_completion.description: Ensure Ground Floor (G.*) and Top Floor (T.*) spaces are not modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Equipment Power Density values for spaces starting with 'G.' and 'T.' remain at their original values (not 0.65), or the agent explicitly filters to only edit 'M.' spaces.

task_completion.description: Run the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST simulation dialog, progress bar, or 'Simulation Complete' results window is visible on the screen.
The agent clicks 'File -> Save', clicks the save floppy disk icon, or presses Ctrl+S, and no unsaved indicator remains.

integrity.description: The agent used the eQUEST GUI to modify the building model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes were made through eQUEST's interface (e.g., Detailed Data Edit or spreadsheet views), not by opening the .inp file in a text editor like Notepad or Vim.

integrity.description: The simulation was executed within the eQUEST application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard eQUEST DOE-2.2 simulation dialog/progress window appeared, rather than a mocked terminal command.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify unrelated building parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Only the Equipment Power Density (EQUIPMENT-W/SQFT) was changed. Lighting, HVAC, or building geometry fields were not altered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project: 4StoreyBuilding. Target occupied spaces to update to 0.65 W/sqft: M.S21, M.E22, M.N23, M.W24, M.C25. Plenums (M.S26, M.E27, M.N28, M.W29, M.C30) do not have equipment loads and should be ignored. Ground (G.*) and Top (T.*) floor spaces must NOT be modified. A full annual DOE-2.2 simulation must be executed in eQUEST.
